prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `baf41dbf`.
codex_response:
`baf41dbf` is implemented as a rectangular green line-structure task: detect the green box, keep its fully filled internal row/column lines, and move only the box boundaries outward toward the external `6` markers, stopping one cell before the farthest marker on each side. I used the summary hint as a starting hypothesis and kept it because it matched the official examples once reduced to “preserve full row/column strokes while expanding the boundary.”

The generator matches the task family by sampling a single green wireframe on black with optional one internal horizontal line and/or one internal vertical line, then placing a bottom marker plus left/right markers in the same style as the originals and rendering the expanded output from that latent structure. No new primitive was needed. Validation passed: official verifier `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the preview sheets look on-distribution.
